Class FileBasedNodeSampler

java.lang.Object
dom.institution.lab.cns.engine.sampling.interfaces.AbstractNodeSampler
dom.institution.lab.cns.engine.sampling.filesamplers.FileBasedNodeSampler
All Implemented Interfaces:
IMultiSowable
public class FileBasedNodeSampler extends AbstractNodeSampler
Node sampler that reads node characteristics from a CSV file.

The CSV file is expected to contain the following columns:

  1. Node ID (ignored)
  2. Node hash power (float)
  3. Node electric power (float, Watts)
  4. Node electricity cost (float, currency per kWh)
Optionally, the first line can be a header, which will be skipped.

If the file does not contain enough nodes according to the configuration property net.numOfNodes, additional node samples are drawn from an optional AbstractNodeSampler passed as the alternative sampler.

See Also:

    Returns the mining interval for a node with the given hash power.

    Returns the next node electricity cost sample (currency per kWh) from the file, or from the alternative sampler if the file queue is empty.

  • Constructor Details

    • FileBasedNodeSampler

      public FileBasedNodeSampler(String nodesFilePath, AbstractNodeSampler nodeSampler)
      Creates a FileBasedNodeSampler that reads node data from a file.
      Parameters:
      nodesFilePath - Path to the CSV file containing node data
      nodeSampler - Alternative AbstractNodeSampler for additional nodes if file specifies fewer nodes than required as per configuration

  • Method Details

    • loadNodeConfig

      public void loadNodeConfig()
      Loads node data from the file, assuming the first line is a header.

    • loadNodeConfig

      public void loadNodeConfig(boolean hasHeaders)
      Loads node data from the file, optionally skipping the first line if it is a header.
      Parameters:
      hasHeaders - True if the first line is a header

    • getNextMiningInterval

      public long getNextMiningInterval(double hashPower)
      Returns the mining interval for a node with the given hash power.

      Delegates to the alternative sampler.

      Specified by:
      getNextMiningInterval in class AbstractNodeSampler
      Parameters:
      hashPower - The hash power of the node (Giga-Hashes/sec)
      Returns:
      A time interval in milliseconds.
      See Also:
      • AbstractNodeSampler.getNextMiningInterval(double)

    • getNextNodeElectricPower

      public float getNextNodeElectricPower()
      Returns the next node electric power sample (Watts) from the file, or from the alternative sampler if the file queue is empty.
      Specified by:
      getNextNodeElectricPower in class AbstractNodeSampler
      Returns:
      A node electric power in Watts.
      See Also:
      • AbstractNodeSampler.getNextNodeElectricPower()

    • getNextNodeHashPower

      public float getNextNodeHashPower()
      Returns the next node hash power sample from the file, or from the alternative sampler if the file queue is empty.
      Specified by:
      getNextNodeHashPower in class AbstractNodeSampler
      Returns:
      A hashpower sample (hashes/second).
      See Also:
      • AbstractNodeSampler.getNextNodeHashPower()

    • getNextNodeElectricityCost

      public float getNextNodeElectricityCost()
      Returns the next node electricity cost sample (currency per kWh) from the file, or from the alternative sampler if the file queue is empty.
      Specified by:
      getNextNodeElectricityCost in class AbstractNodeSampler
      Returns:
      A sample of electricity cost (real currency / kWh)
      See Also:
      • AbstractNodeSampler.getNextNodeElectricityCost()

    • getNextRandomNode

      public int getNextRandomNode(int nNodes)
      Returns a random node index.

      Delegates to the alternative sampler.

      Specified by:
      getNextRandomNode in class AbstractNodeSampler
      Parameters:
      nNodes - The number of nodes to select from.
      Returns:
      The ID of a selected node.
      See Also:
      • AbstractNodeSampler.getNextRandomNode(int)

    • updateSeed

      public void updateSeed()
      Updates the seed of the alternative sampler.

      Prints an error if the alternative sampler is not defined.

      Specified by:
      updateSeed in interface IMultiSowable
      Specified by:
      updateSeed in class AbstractNodeSampler
